title: Work, life, and broken windows
summary: I've been working fully remotely for almost 18 months now. It's not a temporary measure, brought on by the Covid 19 pandemic, it's because the place I work is fully remote. No offices anywhere (just like Elastic and Gitlab, last time I checked). It's not my first rodeo either, th
